root.prompt: Find the golden prompt for a skill through systematic variation and scoring. Full loop: (1) load rubric or call signal-quest-rubric to create one, (2) call signal-quest-variate to generate N variations, (3) call signal-quest-score to rank them, (4) identify excellence signals -- what made the top output better?, (5) extract the pattern, propose a rubric criterion update, (6) apply the update, (7) iterate from step 2 until dual convergence: all scenarios pass AND no new excellence patterns emerge across 2 consecutive rounds. Write the converged prompt as the skill body.
